doctor_versus_native.conclusion: Doctor remains justified locally; global optimality is not proven.
doctor_versus_native.reason: The zero-Doctor native allocation was physically tested and failed contextual F1.

proven: On the sealed Kimi splits, the retained deployable representation is P1_DUAL_PATH_RECOVERY_R16X2 at 0.908590952555 complete BPW; it is not F2-promotable.
All six proposed nonlinear families have terminal adjudications. The physically tested families closed without a replicated F2 winner: N1, N2, N4, N6.
The teacher-hidden experiment is an inference-invalid oracle. No tested row met its preregistered rescue-confidence boundary, so it does not establish a deployable repair.
The exact 5 GiB disk law, dependency-safe GC, and one-heavy-plus-light execution policy were exercised while the sole source and MOP remained protected.
Within the tested physical families and oracle grid, the nonlinear region is closed; the missing reliable correction information was not encoded under the legal budget.
N1/N2/N4/N6 were physically serialized and tested on contextual F1.
No contextual nonlinear/native row survived its sealed F1 decision.
The tested zero-Doctor native allocation failed contextual F1.
M1 produced no row meeting its preregistered CI admission threshold.
suggested: Kimi favors preserving or regenerating the pre-router functional state trajectory over downstream linear repair.
Conditional damage prediction has scientific value, but a gate is not a repair until the physical correction module wins held out.
The next parent should begin with native functional students and oracle bandwidth probes before broad weight-codebook searches.
Compact conditional structure may exist because the M2 gate predicts high-error events.
Useful oracle correction is concentrated but was not converted into a deployable survivor.
unproven: These Kimi results do not prove a universal lower bound for all models, domains, or compact architectures.
A failed tested nonlinear grid does not prove that every possible sub-1-BPW nonlinear representation must fail.
The teacher-hidden oracle does not prove that its score-selected coefficients or selectors are available at inference.
No causal claim is made beyond the measured splits, layers, interventions, and replication boundaries.
No nonlinear representation can ever work for Kimi.
Rates below 0.75 BPW are intrinsically impossible when M5 is prerequisite-absent.
The nonlinear oracle gap is zero; it is undefined when no physical nonlinear survivor exists.

next_parent.action: Start a native functional student with teacher-hidden bandwidth and oracle-to-physical probes first.

N3.reason: N3 requires a surviving representation family plus multi-layer/expert sensitivity evidence to reallocate.
N3.scientific_interpretation: This is not a tested failure. The experiment is inadmissible because its required parent representation did not survive contextual F1.

N5.reason: N5 requires a viable contextual residual generator and cross-expert cold/high-use captures.
N5.scientific_interpretation: This is not a tested failure. The experiment is inadmissible because its required parent representation did not survive contextual F1.

M1.reason: No cached boundary row met the preregistered forward-admission CI.

M2.reason: The gate may predict damage, but no physical nonlinear residual/high-precision module survived F1 to place behind it.

M3.mapping_caveat: M3 is closed only at the one-block direct-function scope exercised by N6.
M3.reason: The teacher-free native functional student was tested and retired at contextual F1.

M4.reason: No coherent compact F1 survivor exists to install at early/middle/late sentinels.
M4.scientific_interpretation: A synthetic multi-layer perturbation would not test M4.

M6.conclusion: Doctor remains justified locally; global optimality is not proven.
M6.reason: The zero-Doctor native allocation was physically tested and failed contextual F1.

M7.reason: No nonlinear F1 survivor exists to supply BEST_NONLINEAR_PHYSICAL.
M7.scientific_interpretation: The baseline/linear/oracle fractions are tested; the nonlinear fraction is undefined rather than zero. Attribution remains MIXED_UNRESOLVED.
